en.name: Connections
en.desc: Group 16 words into 4 categories of 4 words each. Identify the hidden connections between words in this challenging puzzle game. Can you find all groups?
en.howToPlay: Select 4 words you think belong together, then submit. If correct, the category is revealed. You have 4 mistakes allowed. Solve all 4 groups to win!
tips: Look for words that could fit multiple categories
Start with the most obvious connections
Be careful with tricky words that seem related
Yellow is easiest, purple is hardest

zh.name: 词语连线
zh.desc: 将16个单词分成4组，每组4个词。在这款挑战性谜题游戏中找出词语之间的隐藏联系。你能找到所有分组吗？
zh.howToPlay: 选择你认为属于一组的4个单词，然后提交。如果正确，会显示类别名称。你有4次错误机会。解决所有4组即可获胜！
tips: 寻找可能适合多个类别的单词
小心看起来相关但实际上不是的棘手单词
